chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1438 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 12.02.2026 Ms. Fouzia Zahid, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP ------------------------------------ Applicants/accused are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant has filed statement along with certain documents as well as order dated 03.02.2026 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/MCTC Thatta in Sessions Case No.88 of 2025, arising out of FIR No.18/2025, registered at P.S. Ghorabari, for offence under Sections 324, 147, 148, 149, 452, 506/2, 114, 504, PPC, which reveals that the applicants/accused have been acquitted of the charge on the basis of compromise, therefore, learned counsel for applicants does not press the instant criminal bail application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
